'''Neil Law''' (born 23 October 1974) is an English former [[rugby union]], and professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played club level rugby union (RU) for [[Northampton Saints]] and [[Otley R.U.F.C.]], and club level rugby league (RL) for the [[Sheffield Eagles]] (both the original, and current Sheffield Eagles clubs), the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], and the [[York City Knights]], as a {{rlp|fb|wg}} or {{rlp|ce}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Background==
Law was born in [[Sheffield]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.<ref name="yorkpress">{{cite web|title=Knights battle to get Law on their side|url=http://www.yorkpress.co.uk/archive/2005/02/15/7869313.Knights_battle_to_get_Law_on_their_side|website=York Press|accessdate=20 May 2015|date=15 February 2005}}</ref>

==Rugby league career==
Law played in the [[Super League]] for [[Sheffield Eagles]] in 1998, and the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] from 1999 until 2002, when he left the club by mutual consent.<ref>{{cite web|title=Law leaves ailing Wildcats|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/2207652.stm|website=BBC Sport|access-date=20 May 2015|date=21 August 2002}}</ref>

Law joined the [[York City Knights]] in 2003, and scored 11 tries in 12 games before switching to rugby union.<ref name="yorkpress" /> He returned to the York City Knights in 2005, scoring a further 25 tries in 44 appearances during the next two seasons.<ref>{{cite web|title=Appearances/Scorers - Season 2005|url=http://www.yorkcityknights.co.uk/mainFrame/appearances05.htm|publisher=York City Knights|accessdate=20 May 2015|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20060928194555/http://www.yorkcityknights.co.uk/mainFrame/appearances05.htm|archivedate=28 September 2006}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|title=Appearances/Scorers - Season 2006|url=http://www.yorkcityknights.co.uk/mainFrame/appearances06.html|publisher=York City Knights|accessdate=20 May 2015|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20060928194541/http://www.yorkcityknights.co.uk/mainFrame/appearances06.html|archivedate=28 September 2006}}</ref> He returned to the Sheffield Eagles for one season in 2007, making nine appearances.<ref>{{cite web|title=Sheffield Eagles 2007 Player Stats|url=http://www.sheffieldeagles.com/playerstats2007.htm|publisher=Sheffield Eagles RLFC|accessdate=23 May 2015|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20090412123234/http://www.sheffieldeagles.com/playerstats2007.htm|archivedate=12 April 2009}}</ref>

==Personal life==
Neil Law is the [[sibling|brother]] of the rugby league footballer; [[Graham Law]].
